response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack and AI-agent infrastructure experience (TypeScript, Node.js, MCP) but lacks direct evidence of GenAI-specific work (e.g., RAG, vector databases, LLM optimization) in his 7-month tenure at re:cinq. His background in distributed systems and cloud (AWS CDK) is relevant, but his resume does not clearly demonstrate the required 8+ years of building production-grade AI solutions or expertise in multi-agent frameworks. The candidate’s depth in lower-level languages (D, C++) and DevOps may offset some gaps if probed in an interview.
strengths: 8+ years of full-stack engineering with TypeScript/Node.js, including AI-agent infrastructure (MCP)
Proven leadership in technical domains (e.g., DevOps, CI/CD, TDD) and mentoring teams
Strong cloud experience (AWS CDK) and distributed systems (micro-services handling millions of requests/sec)
concerns: Limited visible experience with GenAI core technologies (RAG, vector databases, LLM optimization) despite Staff-level role
No clear evidence of multi-agent system frameworks (LangGraph, CrewAI) or LLM performance metrics in resume
Short tenure (7 months) in current GenAI-focused role (re:cinq) raises questions about depth of recent AI expertise
